title: boechera paupercula
intro: Boechera paupercula, also known as the small yellow alyssum or poor's alpine cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Boechera paupercula include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting overall well-being. Boechera paupercula can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
